creator: aryeh.friedman@gmail.com
text:
Firefox 63.0.1_1 (on 11.2-release) refuses to open *ANY* site/url when attempting the following message is sent to the console:

###!!! [Parent][MessageChannel] Error: (msgtype=0x190084,name=PBrowser::Msg_Destroy) Channel error: cannot send/recv

For referemce:

This is r483632 from svn and the machine is:

FreeBSD lilith 11.2-RELEASE-p4 FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE-p4 #0 r339065: Mon Oct  1 14:01:40 EDT 2018     root@lilith:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
